Translation.Description: A crown to rule them all or at least a nifty ornament which will allow you to become that haughty, high and mighty ruler standing way above the rabble. Word to the wise sovereign: every once in a while, try to lose those superior airs and strive to remember who your friends are.
Translation.Provides: This unit receives double the normal Swarm bonus
Allows the owner to cast Cull the Weak
